title: Anchor Counter
description:
Allows you to see how many anchors another player is holding. 

Requires CIT Resewn (Or optifine)
body:
# HerobaneNair's Anchor Counter
## What does it do?
- **Allows you to see how many anchors another player is holding**
- **Has a color gradient from red to yellow to green in increasing order in increments of 4**
- **Will not work on servers that don't send that information to the player's client.**

## Is this allowed?
Not allowed for vanilla tier list fights. 
Also not allowed on any servers that have a rule against texture packs giving an advantage in terms of count/durability.
Note that most servers allow this though.
Does not give any real combat advantage as players can just count how many anchors were placed. (Same advantage as totem counter essentially)

## How to use?
All versions will work with the pack. It might appear red on your resource-packs folder but should work on all versions above 1.16

### I want to add numbers to a different item like that
You can use the pack for the textures and models as well, if you want to, for example, see how many dried kelp blocks another player is holding. Note that each model will need to be changed so it will map to dried kelp blocks rather than respawn anchors.

### Compatibility
Does not change the actual textures of the respawn anchor, just adds an overlay of the number.

---

Requires CIT Resewn https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn

## Contact Me:
Any problems, questions, help:
